nativeProps: HTML div attributes on the stable root except children

compositionPolicy.progress: The existing Mergora Progress primitive owns the labelled native progress element and visible locale-formatted percentage/byte value.
compositionPolicy.status: Queued, uploading, paused, retrying, complete, error, and cancelled are explicit text plus data-state values rather than color-only projections.
compositionPolicy.announcements: When announceProgress is true, a polite atomic region updates only when status or the configured percentage bucket changes; false removes the live region and announcement updates entirely.
compositionPolicy.transport: The component displays consumer-owned state and never starts, retries, pauses, cancels, or removes an upload.
